selection_rule: stable_hash(offer_id + visual_key), later without duplicates per rendered feed
live_usage: Only entries with status=ready or deliberately approved fallback may be used by premium UI surfaces. Planned slots are production backlog only.
visual_rules: AI visuals must be symbolic and must not claim to document a real place or real event.
No readable logos, posters, brands or third-party artwork.
Main subject must be safe for 16:9 card crops.
Weak raw images should be replaced or downgraded, not rescued through CSS crop hotfixes.

b2_tonwerke_route.label: B2 Tonwerke-Route
b2_tonwerke_route.description: Rechtlich nutzbarer echter Foto-Fallback fuer die B2-Route mit Tonwerke-/Freizeitzentrum-Bezug.

images.alt: Luftbild des Freizeitzentrums Tonwerke in Bocholt mit Wasserfläche, Liegewiese und Freizeitbereich.
images.author: Dietmar Rabich
images.credit: Dietmar Rabich / Wikimedia Commons / CC BY-SA 4.0
images.modifications: 16:9 crop, resized to 1200x675, converted to WebP.
images.note: Rechtlich nutzbarer Fallback fuer b2-tonwerke-route; kein Premium-Endbild. Besseres Betreiber-/Stadtfoto spaeter bevorzugt.
